name: Rhône (France)
description: Per pale: at the hoist a red field with a white rampant lion beneath a blue chief bearing three yellow fleurs-de-lis (arms of Lyon); at the fly a yellow field with a black rampant lion, armed and langued red, charged with a red label (arms of Beaujolais).
history: The flag impales the arms of the city of Lyon with those of the Beaujolais.

features.role: white lion of Lyon at hoist
black lion of Beaujolais at fly
